message:
test(core): re-regenerate enrollment and simulate CBOR vectors

Minor follow-up regeneration of the two CBOR test vectors
(2 insertions / 2 deletions each — a single byte-level change per
file, not a structural overhaul). Matches the golden vector
expectations after recent C3.4 constraint propagation and the
InvalidRequest error taxonomy cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
